examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなく Verb
examples.sentence: 遠くを見るともなく窓の外を眺めた。
examples.translation: I found myself gazing out the window, not really looking at anything in particular.
examples.translationEn: I found myself gazing out the window, not really looking at anything in particular.
examples.romaji: Tooku o miru tomonaku mado no soto o nagameta.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなく Verb
examples.sentence: 知るともなく、彼が去ったことを感じた。
examples.translation: Without really knowing, I felt that he had left.
examples.translationEn: Without really knowing, I felt that he had left.
examples.romaji: Shiru tomonaku, kare ga satta koto o kanjita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなく Verb
examples.sentence: 本を読むともなく、ページをめくっていた。
examples.translation: Without intending to read, I was just flipping through the pages of the book.
examples.translationEn: Without intending to read, I was just flipping through the pages of the book.
examples.romaji: Hon o yomu tomonaku, peiji o mekutte ita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなく Verb
examples.sentence: 寝るともなく、ベッドに横になっていた。
examples.translation: I was lying in bed without really intending to sleep.
examples.translationEn: I was lying in bed without really intending to sleep.
examples.romaji: Neru tomonaku, beddo ni yoko ni natte ita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなしに Verb
examples.sentence: 本を読むともなしに眠ってしまった。
examples.translation: I ended up falling asleep while reading the book without really meaning to.
examples.translationEn: I ended up falling asleep while reading the book without really meaning to.
examples.romaji: Hon o yomu tomonashi ni nemutte shimatta.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなしに Verb
examples.sentence: 軽い気持ちで手紙を書くともなしに、彼に本心を告白した。
examples.translation: While writing a letter casually, I ended up confessing my true feelings to him.
examples.translationEn: While writing a letter casually, I ended up confessing my true feelings to him.
examples.romaji: Karui kimochi de tegami o kaku tomonashi ni, kare ni honshin o kokuhaku shita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなしに Verb
examples.sentence: 散歩をするともなしに、新しいカフェを見つけた。
examples.translation: While I was walking with no particular destination, I found a new cafe.
examples.translationEn: While I was walking with no particular destination, I found a new cafe.
examples.romaji: Sanpo o suru tomonashi ni, atarashii kafe o mitsuketa.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる ともなしに Verb
examples.sentence: 洋服を整理するともなしに、昔の写真を見つけた。
examples.translation: As I was absentmindedly organizing clothes, I came across some old photos.
examples.translationEn: As I was absentmindedly organizing clothes, I came across some old photos.
examples.romaji: Youfuku o seiri suru tomonashi ni, mukashi no shashin o mitsuketa.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる なり
examples.sentence: 家に帰るなり、すぐに寝た。
examples.translation: As soon as I got home, I went to sleep.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I got home, I went to sleep.
examples.romaji: Ie ni kaeru nari, sugu ni neta.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる なり
examples.sentence: 彼が駅に着くなり、電話をかけてきた。
examples.translation: He called me the moment he arrived at the station.
examples.translationEn: He called me the moment he arrived at the station.
examples.romaji: Kare ga eki ni tsuku nari, denwa o kakete kita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる なり
examples.sentence: ドアを開けるなり、犬が吠え始めた。
examples.translation: As soon as I opened the door, the dog started barking.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I opened the door, the dog started barking.
examples.romaji: Doa o akeru nari, inu ga hoe hajimeta.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる なり
examples.sentence: テストが終わるなり、彼は教室を出て行った。
examples.translation: He left the classroom the moment the test ended.
examples.translationEn: He left the classroom the moment the test ended.
examples.romaji: Tesuto ga owaru nari, kare wa kyoushitsu o dete itta.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にとどまらず～も
examples.sentence: 彼は仕事にとどまらず、ボランティア活動もしている。
examples.translation: He does not just work; he also does volunteer activities.
examples.translationEn: He does not just work; he also does volunteer activities.
examples.romaji: Kare wa shigoto ni todomarazu, borantia katsudou mo shite iru.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にとどまらず～も
examples.sentence: この機能は写真撮影にとどまらず、動画撮影も可能です。
examples.translation: This function is not limited to taking photos; it can also record videos.
examples.translationEn: This function is not limited to taking photos; it can also record videos.
examples.romaji: Kono kinou wa shashin satsuei ni todomarazu, douga satsuei mo kanou desu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にとどまらず～も
examples.sentence: このレストランは日本料理にとどまらず、中華料理も提供しています。
examples.translation: This restaurant not only serves Japanese food, but also Chinese cuisine.
examples.translationEn: This restaurant not only serves Japanese food, but also Chinese cuisine.
examples.romaji: Kono resutoran wa Nihon ryouri ni todomarazu, Chuuka ryouri mo teikyou shiteimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にとどまらず～も
examples.sentence: その企業は製造業にとどまらず、流通業務も手がけている。
examples.translation: That company’s operations go beyond manufacturing; they also handle distribution.
examples.translationEn: That company’s operations go beyond manufacturing; they also handle distribution.
examples.romaji: Sono kigyou wa seizougyou ni todomarazu, ryuutsuugyou mo tegakete iru.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にはあたらない
examples.sentence: パニックに陥るにはあたらない。
examples.translation: There’s no need to panic.
examples.translationEn: There’s no need to panic.
examples.romaji: Panikku ni ochiiru ni wa ataranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にはあたらない
examples.sentence: 彼に謝るにはあたらない。
examples.translation: There’s no need to apologize to him.
examples.translationEn: There’s no need to apologize to him.
examples.romaji: Kare ni ayamaru ni wa ataranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にはあたらない
examples.sentence: そのようなことを心配するにはあたらない。
examples.translation: It’s not worth worrying about such things.
examples.translationEn: It’s not worth worrying about such things.
examples.romaji: Sono you na koto o shinpai suru ni wa ataranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にはあたらない
examples.sentence: それについて深く考えるにはあたらない。
examples.translation: There’s no need to think too deeply about it.
examples.translationEn: There’s no need to think too deeply about it.
examples.romaji: Sore ni tsuite fukaku kangaeru ni wa ataranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも
examples.sentence: 明日雨が降ったとしても、傘を持つにも荷物が多すぎる。
examples.translation: Even if it rains tomorrow, I have too much luggage to bring an umbrella.
examples.translationEn: Even if it rains tomorrow, I have too much luggage to bring an umbrella.
examples.romaji: Ashita ame ga futta to shite mo, kasa o motsu ni mo nimotsu ga oosugiru.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも
examples.sentence: 試験に落ちたが、もう一度受けるにもお金が足りない。
examples.translation: I failed the exam, but I don’t have the money to take it again even if I wanted to.
examples.translationEn: I failed the exam, but I don’t have the money to take it again even if I wanted to.
examples.romaji: Shiken ni ochita ga, mou ichido ukeru ni mo okane ga tarinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも
examples.sentence: 彼に会いたいと思っても、彼に会うにも難しい状況だ。
examples.translation: Even if I want to see him, it's a difficult situation to meet him.
examples.translationEn: Even if I want to see him, it's a difficult situation to meet him.
examples.romaji: Kare ni aitai to omotte mo, kare ni au ni mo muzukashii joukyou da.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも
examples.sentence: この空港から彼女の家に行くにもタクシーが必要だ。
examples.translation: I'd need a taxi to get from this airport to her house, even if I wanted to go.
examples.translationEn: I'd need a taxi to get from this airport to her house, even if I wanted to go.
examples.romaji: Kono kuukou kara kanojo no ie ni iku ni mo takushii ga hitsuyou da.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 彼を理解しようにも理解できない。
examples.translation: Even if I try to understand him, I can't.
examples.translationEn: Even if I try to understand him, I can't.
examples.romaji: Kare o rikai shiyou ni mo rikai dekinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 走ろうにも走れない。
examples.translation: Even if I want to run, I can't.
examples.translationEn: Even if I want to run, I can't.
examples.romaji: Hashirou ni mo hashirenai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 泣こうにも泣けない。
examples.translation: Even if I want to cry, I can't.
examples.translationEn: Even if I want to cry, I can't.
examples.romaji: Nakou ni mo nakenai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる にも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 忘れようにも忘れられない。
examples.translation: Even if I try to forget, I just can’t.
examples.translationEn: Even if I try to forget, I just can’t.
examples.romaji: Wasureyou ni mo wasurerarenai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからざる Noun
examples.sentence: 人を裏切るべからざる行為だ。
examples.translation: Betraying others is an act that must not be done.
examples.translationEn: Betraying others is an act that must not be done.
examples.romaji: Hito o uragiru bekara zaru koui da.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからざる Noun
examples.sentence: 子供を傷つけるべからざる行動だ。
examples.translation: Hurting a child is a behavior that must not happen.
examples.translationEn: Hurting a child is a behavior that must not happen.
examples.romaji: Kodomo o kizutsukeru bekara zaru koudou da.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからざる Noun
examples.sentence: 公に嘘をつくべからざる行動だ。
examples.translation: Lying publicly is an act that should not be done.
examples.translationEn: Lying publicly is an act that should not be done.
examples.romaji: Ooyake ni uso o tsuku bekara zaru koudou da.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからざる Noun
examples.sentence: 他人の財産を侵すべからざる行為だ。
examples.translation: Infringing on someone else’s property is an act that must not be performed.
examples.translationEn: Infringing on someone else’s property is an act that must not be performed.
examples.romaji: Tanin no zaisan o okasu bekara zaru koui da.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからず
examples.sentence: 嘘をつくべからず。
examples.translation: One must not tell lies.
examples.translationEn: One must not tell lies.
examples.romaji: Uso o tsuku bekara zu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからず
examples.sentence: 彼らの秘密を漏らすべからず。
examples.translation: You must not leak their secrets.
examples.translationEn: You must not leak their secrets.
examples.romaji: Karera no himitsu o morasu bekara zu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからず
examples.sentence: ルールを破るべからず。
examples.translation: You must not break the rules.
examples.translationEn: You must not break the rules.
examples.romaji: Ruuru o yaburu bekara zu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べからず
examples.sentence: 勉強を怠るべからず。
examples.translation: One must not neglect their studies.
examples.translationEn: One must not neglect their studies.
examples.romaji: Benkyou o okotaru bekara zu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べく
examples.sentence: 成功するべく、日々努力しています。
examples.translation: In order to succeed, I am working hard every day.
examples.translationEn: In order to succeed, I am working hard every day.
examples.romaji: Seikou suru beku, hibi doryoku shite imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べく
examples.sentence: 健康を維持するべく、毎日運動をしています。
examples.translation: In order to maintain my health, I exercise every day.
examples.translationEn: In order to maintain my health, I exercise every day.
examples.romaji: Kenkou o iji suru beku, mainichi undou o shite imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べく
examples.sentence: 彼は学位を得るべく、毎日勉強しています。
examples.translation: He studies every day in order to get a degree.
examples.translationEn: He studies every day in order to get a degree.
examples.romaji: Kare wa gakui o eru beku, mainichi benkyou shite imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verbる べく
examples.sentence: 早く目的地に到着するべく、タクシーを呼びました。
examples.translation: I called a taxi in order to arrive at the destination quickly.
examples.translationEn: I called a taxi in order to arrive at the destination quickly.
examples.romaji: Hayaku mokutekichi ni touchaku suru beku, takushii o yobimashita.
